quickSetup.name: Name
quickSetup.selectProjectFirst: First select or create a project.
quickSetup.existingGoodsReceiptFound: The current draft goods for this project were accepted. This step is automatically skipped.
quickSetup.existingGoodsReceiptPostedInfo: This goods has been accepted and posted. New goods acceptance cannot be created.
quickSetup.existingGoodsReceiptMissingFishLine: No fish line was found in this goods acceptance. After adding the fish row, continue.
quickSetup.existingGoodsReceiptMissingFishCount: Quantity of fish is 0 or missing. Quantity information must be entered for distribution.
quickSetup.existingGoodsReceiptMissingBatchCard: Batch information is missing. Batch must be created before distribution.
quickSetup.readyForDistribution: Ready for distribution. You can distribute them to the cages in step 3 below.
quickSetup.completeGoodsReceiptInfoFirst: Complete the goods acceptance fish line information to continue.
quickSetup.noAvailableCages: No cages were found available for this project.

toast.goodsReceiptCreateFailed: Goods acceptance could not be created
toast.existingGoodsReceiptFound: The current draft goods have been accepted, the installation continues with this record.
toast.existingGoodsReceiptCheckFailed: Existing goods acceptance control could not be performed
toast.existingGoodsReceiptMissingBatch: Batch information is missing in the current goods acceptance. Enter average grams in the fish line and try again.
toast.goodsReceiptAlreadyExists: There is already a goods acceptance record
